name: Lynn's Pasta and Creamy Roasted Garlic Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 to 2 heads roasted garlic,  see note
14 oz. package frozen or fresh tortellini OR
recipeInstructions:
NOTE: To roast garlic, select large heads. Cut off the top to expose the cloves (a serrated knife is best). Place the head in a square of aluminum foil with the head facing up. Drizzle with 1 to 2 tablespoons olive oil. Seal the foil and roast for 1 hour at 350 degrees F. Let cool, separate into cloves and squeeze out the garlic.
Place roasted garlic in a blender or food processor. Add the olive oil and 1/4 cup cream. Blend until garlic is pulverized. Add the remaining cream, sour cream, parmesan cheese, salt, and pepper. Blend to combine. The sauce will be thick at this point. Set aside.
Cook pasta al dente; drain. Melt butter in a skillet. Add pasta and toss with the butter until coated. Add the sauce and cook, stirring occasionally, until the sauce becomes thin. Simmer for 10 minutes. Serve immediately with extra parmesan cheese sprinkled on top.
